section.heading: Report to Congress
section.chapeau: The Secretary shall report to the appropriate Committees on the implementation of this chapter. The report shall include—

subparagraph.content: the estimated number of acres of wetlands and habitat for waterfowl and other migratory birds that were restored, protected, or enhanced during such two-year period by Federal, State, and local agencies and other entities in the United States, Canada, and Mexico;
trends in the population size and distribution of North American migratory birds;
the status of efforts to establish agreements with nations in the Western Hemisphere pursuant to section 4413 of this title; and
wetlands conservation projects funded under this chapter, listed and identified by type, conservation mechanism (such as acquisition, easement, or lease), location, and duration; and

paragraph.content: an annual assessment of the status of wetlands conservation projects, including an accounting of expenditures by Federal, State, and other United States entities, and expenditures by Canadian and Mexican sources to carry out these projects.

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: Section 4413 of this title, referred to in par. (1)(C), was in the original a reference to section 16 of Pub. L. 101–233 which enacted section 4413 of this title and amended section 2912 of this title.

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 2002—Par. (1)(C). Pub. L. 107–308, § 8(a)(12), substituted “Western Hemisphere” for “western hemisphere” and made technical amendment to reference in original act which appears in text as reference to section 4413 of this title.
Par. (1)(D). Pub. L. 107–308, § 8(a)(13), substituted “; and” for period at end.
